steps.t: The hobbits walked south-west, towards where they believed the Entwash to be. You should try to find the Entwash and search for signs of the two lost …
Signs of the hobbits' passage may be found along the Entwash heading north-west, deeper into the forest. You should search for signs of the two lost h…
The hobbits walked north along the Entwash. You should search for signs of the two lost halflings.
The hobbits veered north-east on the path running alongside the Entwash. You should search for signs of the two lost halflings.
You have followed the hobbits to a strange hill in Fangorn that promises an overlook above the treetops.
